audit_items.proof_trace: cache_clear() enforces correct free ordering: HASH_DEL removes the entry from the hash first, entry->data is freed exactly once via the mutually exclusive free_cb/ss_free branches, entry->key is freed only once after the callback returns (free_firewall_rule uses the key read-only without freeing it), and entry is freed last. HASH_ITER pre-saves tmp before each body execution, making deletion-during-iteration safe with no dangling pointer use.
